name: @dream-horizon-org/devflo
description: AI Software Development Lifecycle — rules, agents, and skills for Cursor and Claude Code, delivered via CLI

scripts.build: npm run build:cli && npm run build:mcp-ui
scripts.sync-templates: rm -rf templates/cursor/agents templates/cursor/rules templates/cursor/skills templates/cursor/commands && cp -r .cursor/agents .cursor/rules .cursor/skills .cursor/commands templates/cursor/
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run install:mcp-ui && npm run build
